message:
feat(tests): add e2e artifact helpers for CLI test structured reporting

tests/common/mod.rs:
- Add cmd_result_to_artifact() helper that converts CmdResult into a
  TestCaseArtifact for structured e2e reporting, with automatic trace ID
  generation, captured stdout/stderr, exit code, and diagnostic entries
- Re-export e2e_artifact module from tui for test use
- Populate error diagnostics from exit code and truncated stderr on failure
- Tagged with "cli" section for CLI-spawned test differentiation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
